open-source-reference/0.2.0.role: canonical executable conformance generator in the public repository
open-source-reference/0.2.0.data_generating_process: portable standard-library synthetic cohort with supplied nuisance truth

document-design-fixture/1.0.0.role: algorithm-design fixture embedded in the Word and Excel submission materials
document-design-fixture/1.0.0.data_generating_process: NumPy and scikit-learn five-fold cross-fit rehearsal with a different cohort mechanism
document-design-fixture/1.0.0.claim_boundary: synthetic design rehearsal only; not the public repository conformance value

interpretation.allowed: Each generator may be checked against its own injected truth and preregistered properties.
interpretation.prohibited: The two point estimates must not be treated as replications of one numerical effect or evidence of real service effectiveness.
interpretation.reason: They use different data-generating processes, covariates, treatment semantics and nuisance-model pipelines.
